title: Settings
description: Manage serial ports, language, and system metadata in one place.
serialDescription: Select the receive and send serial ports. Saving will connect automatically and reconnect after drops. Serial protocol parameters are built in.
serialHint: Changing serial ports saves automatically and triggers a connection. The system will reconnect after drops.
languageDescription: Switch frontend language and inspect backend locale metadata.
apiHint: The frontend talks to the backend through /api by default.
